title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Embassy Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Embassy Group
jsonLd.description:
Embassy Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Embassy Group:
Embassy Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group!
